title: Dell shares jump 39% after server maker reports fastest sales growth since return to public market in 2018
summary: Dell shares surged 39% following the company's announcement of its fastest sales growth since returning to the public market in 2018, driven by soaring demand for AI-optimized servers. The transformation underscores how enterprise AI infrastructure spending has become a major growth driver for legacy technology companies.
content: Dell has gone from being a sleepy legacy tech company to a high-growth AI story, assembling servers packed with graphics processing units.

zh.title: 戴尔股价飙升39% 服务器制造商报告自2018年重返公开市场以来最快的销售增长
zh.summary: 戴尔股价在公司宣布自2018年重返公开市场以来最快的销售增长后飙升39%，这是由人工智能优化服务器的需求激增所推动的。这一转变表明企业人工智能基础设施支出已成为传统科技公司的主要增长驱动力。

title: Earnings season slows but these 7 stocks pack explosive ‘sawtooth’ volatility next week
summary: As earnings season winds down, seven stocks are positioned for significant volatility swings as investors reassess their growth prospects. Market technicals suggest investors remain optimistic despite the slowdown in major company earnings announcements.
content: The S&P 500 is flashing a green light to investors.

zh.title: 财报季放缓，但这7只股票下周面临剧烈的"锯齿"波动
zh.summary: 随着财报季放缓，7只股票准备迎接重大波动幅度，投资者重新评估其增长前景。市场技术面表明，尽管主要公司财报公告放缓，投资者仍持乐观态度。

title: Humanoid robots 'the future' of car making, says BMW
summary: BMW is deploying humanoid robots in its European manufacturing facilities as it expands automation initiatives already underway in the U.S. The move signals automakers are increasingly viewing humanoid robotics as essential to future production capabilities.
content: BMW is introducing humanoid robots to a car plant in Europe, building on similar projects in the US.

zh.title: 宝马称人形机器人是汽车制造的"未来"
zh.summary: 宝马正在其欧洲制造设施中部署人形机器人，扩展已在美国进行的自动化举措。此举表明汽车制造商越来越认为人形机器人对未来生产能力至关重要。

title: When trade soured, this American liquor maker moved to Canada
summary: Phillips Distilling lost 70% of its Canadian business following provincial bans on U.S. liquor imports, but has since developed a strategy to recover market access. The company's story illustrates the competitive challenges faced by American exporters amid protectionist trade measures.
content: Phillips Distilling lost 70% of its Canadian business after provinces banned the sale of US liquor. It has since found a way to sell its products in Canada again.

zh.title: 贸易困难时，这家美国酒精饮料制造商搬迁到加拿大
zh.summary: 飞利浦蒸馏公司在加拿大各省禁止美国酒精进口后失去了70%的加拿大业务，但已制定了恢复市场准入的策略。该公司的故事说明了美国出口商在保护主义贸易措施中面临的竞争挑战。

title: This is the greatest time ever for semiconductors, says CEO of key equipment supplier
summary: Applied Materials CEO declared the semiconductor industry is in its strongest period ever, reflecting unprecedented demand for chip manufacturing equipment. The optimistic assessment underscores how AI infrastructure buildout is driving sustained growth across the entire semiconductor ecosystem.
content: Applied Materials CEO Gary Dickerson said the semiconductor industry is experiencing its strongest period ever.

zh.title: 关键设备供应商首席执行官表示这是半导体产业历来最好的时期
zh.summary: 应用材料公司首席执行官声称半导体产业正处于历来最强时期，反映出对芯片制造设备的前所未有的需求。这一乐观的评估强调了人工智能基础设施建设如何推动整个半导体生态系统的持续增长。

title: Stocks making the biggest moves after hours: Dell Technologies, American Eagle Outfitters, Gap & more
summary: Multiple stocks posted significant after-hours price movements led by Dell Technologies, American Eagle Outfitters, and Gap as investors reacted to earnings results and company guidance. The broad after-hours activity reflects ongoing market sensitivity to retail and technology sector performance.
content: See which stocks are posting big moves after the bell.

zh.title: 盘后波动最大的股票：戴尔科技公司、美国鹰牌服饰公司、Gap等
zh.summary: 多支股票出现重大盘后价格波动，由戴尔科技公司、美国鹰牌服饰公司和Gap公司领导，投资者对盈利结果和公司指导做出反应。广泛的盘后活动反映了投资者对零售和科技部门表现的持续敏感性。

title: Costco gas demand hits records, as shoppers try to stay ahead of future price spikes
summary: Costco's same-store sales surged 9.8% in the third quarter, significantly exceeding analyst expectations, fueled by record-high gasoline sales as members stockpile fuel. The strong performance demonstrates the warehouse retailer's ability to drive consumer spending even amid economic uncertainty.
content: Costco’s same-store sales rose 9.8% during its third quarter, well above Wall Street’s estimates, as gasoline sales provided a nice bump.

zh.title: 好市多汽油需求创新高，购物者争先恐后地在油价上涨前加油
zh.summary: 好市多第三季度同店销售额激增9.8%，远超分析师预期，受益于会员创纪录性地购买并囤积汽油。这一强劲表现展示了这家仓储零售商在经济不确定性中推动消费支出的能力。

title: Disney's ABC files early broadcast licenses renewal 'under protest' against the FCC
summary: Disney filed license renewals for eight ABC broadcast stations under protest following an unusually early FCC review, signaling tensions between the network and regulators. The move reflects growing regulatory scrutiny of major media companies' broadcast operations.
content: Disney said it filed renewals for eight broadcast station licenses "under protest," after the FCC launched an early review years ahead of schedule.

zh.title: 迪士尼ABC以抗议方式提前申请广播许可证续期，反对美国联邦通信委员会
zh.summary: 在美国联邦通信委员会进行异常早期审查后，迪士尼以抗议方式为八个ABC广播电台提交了许可证续期申请，显示该网络与监管机构间的紧张关系。此举反映了对大型媒体公司广播业务日益增长的监管审查。

title: American Eagle's Aerie is booming, but its namesake brand is lagging despite Sydney Sweeney ads
summary: American Eagle exceeded earnings expectations overall, but its flagship brand underperformed analyst estimates despite a high-profile marketing campaign with actress Sydney Sweeney. The mixed results highlight challenges in revitalizing the core American Eagle banner even with increased marketing investment.
content: American Eagle beat Wall Street's expectations but sales at its namesake banner fell short of estimates after its latest Sydney Sweeney campaign.

zh.title: 美鹰Aerie品牌蓬勃发展，但美鹰主品牌尽管有悉尼·斯威尼代言仍表现滞后
zh.summary: 美鹰整体超过了收益预期，但其旗舰品牌尽管有与女演员悉尼·斯威尼的高调营销活动，仍然低于分析师估计。这些参差不齐的结果突出了即使增加营销投资也难以复兴美鹰核心品牌的挑战。

title: Okta jumps 8%, tops first-quarter results on agentic AI demand
summary: Okta's stock jumped 8% after the company exceeded first-quarter results, driven by strong demand for agentic AI tools. CEO Todd McKinnon indicated the company is allocating more resources to this emerging AI segment.
content: CEO Todd McKinnon said Okta is "playing a long game" on AI and is allocating more resources to agentic tools.

zh.title: Okta股票上涨8%，受代理AI需求驱动超过第一季度业绩
zh.summary: Okta股票在公司超过第一季度业绩后上涨8%，由对代理AI工具的强劲需求驱动。首席执行官Todd McKinnon表示，公司正在为这一新兴AI领域分配更多资源。

title: Mythos was the critical trigger for IBM's open-source cybersecurity push, Krishna says
summary: IBM has launched Project Lightwell, an open-source cybersecurity initiative that has attracted major financial institutions including Goldman Sachs, Morgan Stanley, JPMorgan, and Bank of America. The effort represents a significant shift toward collaborative security approaches in the financial sector. This expansion signals growing industry consensus on the value of shared cybersecurity frameworks.
content: IBM has signed Goldman Sachs, Morgan Stanley, JPMorgan and Bank of America onto its open-source cybersecurity effort called Project Lightwell.

zh.title: 密托斯是IBM开源网络安全推进的关键催化剂，Krishna表示
zh.summary: IBM推出了开源网络安全计划Project Lightwell，吸引了包括高盛、摩根士丹利、摩根大通和美国银行等主要金融机构的参与。这项努力代表了金融部门向协作安全方法的重大转变。这一扩展表明了行业对共享网络安全框架价值的日益共识。

title: New '60 Minutes' head Nick Bilton says Paramount hired him to pivot the show before ratings decline
summary: Paramount has appointed former New York Times columnist and Netflix documentary filmmaker Nick Bilton as the new head of "60 Minutes" amid declining ratings for the storied news program. Bilton brings experience from both print journalism and streaming platforms, having previously collaborated with CBS News editor-in-chief Bari Weiss. His hiring signals Paramount's effort to revitalize the iconic program through fresh leadership.
content: Nick Bilton is a former New York Times columnist and has made several documentaries for Netflix, where he worked with CBS News editor-in-chief Bari Weiss.

zh.title: 新任《60分钟》主编Nick Bilton表示Paramount聘请他在收视率下滑前改革该节目
zh.summary: 在这档历史悠久的新闻节目收视率下滑之际，Paramount任命前《纽约时报》专栏作家和Netflix纪录片制片人Nick Bilton担任《60分钟》新主编。Bilton拥有平面新闻和流媒体平台的经验，曾与CBS新闻主编Bari Weiss合作。他的聘用表明Paramount正在通过新的领导力来振兴这一标志性节目。

title: CFTC bid to vacate order against Winklevoss' crypto exchange 'very unusual': ex-agency chief
summary: The CFTC is pursuing an unusual procedural move to vacate an enforcement order against Gemini, the cryptocurrency exchange founded by Tyler and Cameron Winklevoss, who are notable donors to President Trump's 2024 campaign. The effort has drawn scrutiny for potentially reflecting political influence on regulatory actions. This development marks a significant shift in crypto regulation under the Trump administration.
content: Gemini's founders, Tyler and Cameron Winklevoss, were donors to the 2024 election campaign of President Donald Trump.

zh.title: CFTC试图撤销对Winklevoss加密交易所的命令被称为"非常不寻常"：前机构负责人
zh.summary: CFTC正在采取一个不寻常的程序步骤，试图撤销针对由Tyler和Cameron Winklevoss创办的加密交易所Gemini的执法令。这对特朗普2024年竞选活动的重要捐赠者的追求已引发对监管行为可能受到政治影响的审查。这一进展标志着特朗普政府下加密货币监管的重大转变。

title: Red-hot Arm Holdings soars to another all-time high. What's fueling the move this time?
summary: Arm Holdings reached another all-time high as investor enthusiasm continues for the semiconductor design company. The surge reflects strong demand for AI-related chips and broader strength in the semiconductor industry. Arm's performance underscores its critical role in the global AI infrastructure buildout.
content: Every weekday, the Investing Club releases the Homestretch; an actionable afternoon update just in time for the last hour of trading.

zh.title: Arm Holdings火热上涨创新高。这次涨势的推动力是什么？
zh.summary: 随着投资者对这家半导体设计公司热情的持续，Arm Holdings再次创造历史新高。这次上涨反映了对AI相关芯片的强劲需求和整个半导体行业的广泛增长势头。Arm的表现凸显了其在全球AI基础设施建设中的关键角色。

title: Traders' hopes fade for U.S.-Iran nuclear deal this year despite report on potential ceasefire agreement
summary: Despite an Axios report on a potential U.S.-Iran ceasefire agreement, traders on prediction markets show little optimism for a nuclear deal by year's end. Market pricing has remained largely unchanged following the ceasefire report, indicating skepticism about near-term diplomatic breakthroughs. The uncertainty continues to weigh on energy markets.
content: Chances of a nuclear deal between the U.S. and Iran this year haven't moved much on prediction markets after Axios reported that the two agreed to a ceasefire.

zh.title: 尽管有停火协议报告，交易员对美伊核协议今年达成的希望已褪去
zh.summary: 尽管Axios报道了潜在的美伊停火协议，预测市场交易员对年底前达成核协议几乎不抱乐观态度。停火报告发布后市场定价基本保持不变，表明人们对近期外交突破持怀疑态度。这种不确定性继续对能源市场造成压力。

title: Unusual Machines and other drone stocks surge on report Pentagon considering stakes in the industry
summary: Drone company stocks including Unusual Machines surged after reports that the Trump administration is considering funding stakes in the sector. Investor enthusiasm is partly driven by the fact that Donald Trump Jr. holds a shareholder position in at least one of the targeted companies. The development highlights potential conflicts of interest as policy decisions could directly benefit administration-connected investors.
content: Drone stocks surged Thursday on a report the Trump administration is in talks to fund several firms, including one in which Donald Trump Jr. is a shareholder.

zh.title: 据报五角大楼考虑在该行业投资，Unusual Machines等无人机股票飙升
zh.summary: 在特朗普政府考虑向该行业投资的报道后，包括Unusual Machines在内的无人机公司股票飙升。投资者热情的部分原因是Donald Trump Jr.在至少一家目标公司中持有股东权益。这一发展凸显了潜在的利益冲突，因为政策决定可能直接惠及与政府相关的投资者。

title: AI play Nebius is surging after mysterious new hedge fund manager reveals stake. Here are his other holdings
summary: AI-focused company Nebius experienced a significant stock surge following disclosure of a substantial stake by a previously unknown hedge fund manager. The fund specializes in investing in companies positioned to benefit from AI adoption across semiconductors, infrastructure, and power sectors. The move reflects growing investor appetite for AI infrastructure plays beyond pure software companies.
content: The fund invests in publicly traded companies expected to benefit from AI adoption — including semiconductor, infrastructure and power firms.

zh.title: AI公司Nebius在神秘基金经理披露持股后飙升，以下是其他持股情况
zh.summary: AI专注型公司Nebius在一位鲜为人知的对冲基金经理披露大额持股后经历显著股价飙升。该基金专门投资于能从半导体、基础设施和电力等领域的AI应用中获益的公司。这一举措反映了投资者对AI基础设施投资日益增长的热情，范围超越纯软件公司。

title: There may be a secret winner of the streaming wars, and it could end up saving you money
summary: Charter Communications is reassembling a bundle of streaming services, reversing the industry trend of unbundling and potentially offering cost savings to consumers. The strategy appears effective for the cable provider, helping it recover as traditional TV bundles have eroded. The development suggests bundled offerings may resurface as a competitive consumer proposition in streaming.
content: The unwinding of the TV bundle was bad for cable companies, but Charter’s reassembling of a bundle of streaming services is helping it dig out and may ultimately be a money saver for consumers.

zh.title: 流媒体大战可能有秘密赢家，它可能会为你省钱
zh.summary: 美国特许通讯公司正在重新组建流媒体服务捆绑包，逆转业界解绑趋势，可能为消费者提供成本节省。该策略对这家有线电视运营商似乎很有效，帮助其在传统电视捆绑包衰退时实现复苏。这一发展表明，捆绑式服务可能会重新成为流媒体市场中具有竞争力的消费者选择。

title: CNBC Sport: How James Dolan's hot streak could alter his business empire — and legacy
summary: New York Knicks owner James Dolan's reputation is shifting as the basketball team experiences recent success while his off-court ventures gain positive attention. Decades of losing had damaged both the franchise and Dolan's public image, but recent wins are repositioning both his legacy and broader business interests. The turnaround demonstrates how sports performance influences perceptions of an owner's entire empire.
content: Decades of losing turned Knicks fans against owner James Dolan, but the team's recent success and Dolan's off-the-court ventures have cast him in a new light.

zh.title: CNBC体育：詹姆斯·多兰的连胜如何改变其商业帝国和遗产
zh.summary: 纽约尼克斯队老板詹姆斯·多兰的声誉随着球队最近的成功和场外投资获得积极关注而改变。数十年的失败损害了特许经营权和多兰的公众形象，但最近的胜利正在重新定位他的遗产和更广泛的商业利益。这次转折展示了体育成绩如何影响人们对所有者整个帝国的看法。

title: Can jewelry, kids’ clothes and ‘KPop Demon Hunters’ resurrect Kohl’s from the dead?
summary: Kohl's stock surged following better-than-expected sales, driven by expansion into jewelry, children's clothing, and pop culture merchandise including K-pop themed items. Despite the strong recent performance, the department store remains far below its historical peak valuation. The results suggest the retailer's diversification strategy is resonating with consumers.
content: The department-store chain’s stock is soaring after sales beat expectations — but it’s still trading at a fraction of its record high.

zh.title: 珠宝、儿童服装和"K-Pop恶魔猎人"能否让Kohl's起死回生?
zh.summary: Kohl's股票因销售好于预期而飙升，推动力来自珠宝、儿童服装和流行文化商品（包括K-Pop主题商品）的扩展。尽管近期表现强劲，但这家百货商店的估值仍远低于历史高峰。这些结果表明，零售商的多元化战略正在获得消费者的支持。

title: The latest Oura and Fitbit wearables are smarter and sleeker than ever — but do they keep you healthy?
summary: Americans are increasingly using advanced Oura and Fitbit wearables to share health data with AI platforms while paying subscription fees for integrated testing and monitoring services. These devices are becoming central to consumer health management, though questions remain about their actual effectiveness in improving health outcomes. The wearable market is rapidly evolving into a data-collection and subscription-based ecosystem.
content: Americans are sharing data from watches, bands and rings with AI platforms, ordering tests through the companies that sell these products, and paying hundreds of dollars in subscription fees.

zh.title: 最新的Oura和Fitbit可穿戴设备比以往任何时候都更聪明、更时尚——但它们能让你保持健康吗?
zh.summary: 美国人越来越多地使用先进的Oura和Fitbit可穿戴设备与AI平台分享健康数据，同时支付集成测试和监测服务的订阅费。这些设备正在成为消费者健康管理的中心，但关于它们在改善健康结果方面的实际效果仍存在疑问。可穿戴市场正在迅速演变为数据收集和基于订阅的生态系统。

title: Americans’ savings rate falls to lowest level since 2022 as inflation outpaces paychecks
summary: Americans' savings rate has fallen to its lowest level since 2022 as inflation once again outpaces wage growth. The squeeze on household finances means consumers have less available for emergencies and long-term savings goals. This trend reflects deteriorating purchasing power and increases economic vulnerability for many households.
content: As inflation starts outpacing wages again, Americans have less money to put aside for emergencies and other savings goals.

zh.title: 随着通货膨胀超过薪酬增长，美国人的储蓄率跌至2022年以来的最低水平
zh.summary: 美国人的储蓄率已跌至2022年以来的最低水平，因为通货膨胀再次超过工资增长。家庭财务的挤压意味着消费者用于应急和长期储蓄目标的资金更少。这一趋势反映了购买力的下降，并增加了许多家庭的经济脆弱性。

title: Stocks making the biggest moves midday: Unusual Machines, Snowflake, Arm, Dollar Tree & more
summary: Multiple stocks experienced significant midday price movements including Unusual Machines, Snowflake, Arm, and Dollar Tree. The article provides a brief update on stocks making headlines during intraday trading. This coverage helps investors track real-time market movements and trading opportunities.
content: Here are the companies making headlines in midday trading.

zh.title: 股票中盘最大涨跌幅：Unusual Machines、Snowflake、Arm、Dollar Tree等
zh.summary: 多只股票在盘中经历了重大价格波动，包括Unusual Machines、Snowflake、Arm和Dollar Tree。该文章提供了盘中交易中的热门股票的简要更新。这项报道帮助投资者跟踪实时市场动向和交易机会。

title: Time to buy this once high-flying apparel stock? Jay Woods looks at the charts ahead of earnings
summary: Technical analyst Jay Woods from Freedom Capital Markets is providing detailed chart analysis of Lululemon stock ahead of the apparel company's earnings report. The analysis helps investors understand potential price movements and key support/resistance levels before the earnings announcement. Technical analysis is particularly valuable for traders positioning ahead of earnings volatility.
content: Jay Woods of Freedom Capital Markets takes a close look at Lululemon's charts ahead of its earnings report.

zh.title: 现在是否应该买入这只曾经高飞的服装股？Jay Woods在财报前进行图表分析
zh.summary: 自由资本市场的技术分析师Jay Woods在服装公司财报报告前对Lululemon股票进行了详细的图表分析。该分析帮助投资者了解财报公告前潜在的价格变动和关键支撑/阻力位。技术分析对于在财报波动前进行头寸的交易员来说特别有价值。

title: The true cost of the Iran war is billions more than the Pentagon says — and we’re paying for it
summary: The true cost of America's military engagement in Iran significantly exceeds official Pentagon estimates, with cascading effects on inflation and household finances. Washington's accounting methods obscure the full economic impact of military commitments, affecting consumer purchasing power. The hidden costs underscore the complex relationship between defense spending, inflation, and economic policy.
content: Washington’s ‘fuzzy math’ impacts inflation and your wallet.

zh.title: 伊朗战争的真实成本比五角大楼所说的高数十亿美元——我们为此付出了代价
zh.summary: 美国对伊朗军事行动的真实成本远远超过官方五角大楼估计，对通货膨胀和家庭财务产生级联效应。华盛顿的会计方法掩盖了军事承诺的全面经济影响，影响了消费者的购买力。隐性成本突显了国防支出、通货膨胀和经济政策之间的复杂关系。

title: ‘He threatened to cut the roots’: A tree fell onto my neighbor’s property during a storm. Then all hell broke loose.
summary: A tree fell onto a neighbor's property during a storm, causing an estimated $6,000+ in damages and triggering a significant dispute between neighbors. The incident illustrates common property damage disagreements that arise from natural disasters.
content: “The neighbor estimates damage from the tree at approximately $6,000 or more.”

zh.title: "他威胁要砍树根"：暴风雨期间一棵树倒在我邻居的房产上。然后一切都乱套了。
zh.summary: 暴风雨期间，一棵树倒在邻居的房产上，造成估计超过6000美元的损失，并引发邻居之间的重大纠纷。这个事件说明了自然灾害引发的常见财产损失纠纷。

title: Core inflation hit an annual rate of 3.3% in April, as expected, Fed’s preferred gauge shows
summary: Core inflation reached 3.3% annually in April, matching Federal Reserve expectations as measured by the PCE price index. This key inflation gauge helps the Fed assess underlying price pressures when setting monetary policy.
content: The PCE price index for April was expected to show an annual inflation rate of 3.8% for all items and 3.3% for core.

zh.title: 核心通胀在4月达到年率3.3%，符合预期，美联储首选指标显示
zh.summary: 根据PCE物价指数衡量，核心通胀在4月达到年率3.3%，符合美联储预期。这个关键通胀指标帮助美联储在制定货币政策时评估潜在价格压力。

title: Best Buy beats on top and bottom lines as retailer aims to reinvigorate sales
summary: Best Buy exceeded earnings expectations in its latest quarter while pursuing strategies to reverse recent sales declines. The strong earnings report signals progress in stabilizing the retailer's business.
content: Best Buy reported better-than-expected earnings on Thursday as the company works toward turning around its sales slump.

title: Fertitta-owned firm to buy Caesars Entertainment in nearly $18 billion leisure push
summary: A Fertitta-owned company will acquire Caesars Entertainment for approximately $18 billion in a major consolidation of Las Vegas casino operators. The deal takes Caesars, a flagship Strip property, private while including substantial assumed debt.

zh.summary: Fertitta旗下公司将以约180亿美元收购凯撒娱乐，这是拉斯维加斯赌场运营商的重大整合。该交易将凯撒娱乐这个标志性的拉斯维加斯大道物业变为私人企业，同时承担了大量债务。

title: Ferrari CEO defends $640,000 price tag for its first fully electric car
summary: Ferrari CEO Benedetto Vigna justified the $640,000 price of the brand's first fully electric vehicle, the Luce, as appropriate for its technological innovation. The premium pricing reflects Ferrari's positioning in the ultra-luxury segment.

title: Kohl's stock spikes more than 15% as slumping retailer says sales trends are improving

title: Why it’s time to start discussing semiconductors like commodities: There may be a supercycle

summary: Despite strong consumer spending figures, higher inflation is a significant factor driving the increase, meaning Americans are purchasing less volume for their money. This reveals the inflation-adjusted reality behind headline spending growth.

title: Snowflake’s stock surges nearly 40% as AI acceleration drives record product-revenue growth
summary: Snowflake stock jumped toward record highs after beating earnings expectations, raising guidance, and announcing a $6 billion AWS partnership expansion. The surge reflects strong AI-driven demand for the data platform's services.
content: Snowflake’s stock soars toward a record gain after an earnings beat, a raised outlook and a $6 billion commitment to expand its collaboration with Amazon’s AWS.

zh.title: Snowflake股票暴涨近40%，AI加速推动产品收入创纪录增长
zh.summary: Snowflake股票在超过财报预期、上调指导并宣布与AWS的60亿美元合作扩展后跳升至历史高位。股价上涨反映了对该数据平台服务强劲的AI驱动需求。

title: Marvell’s stock falls despite ‘exceptional’ AI demand driving a stronger growth outlook
summary: Custom-chip maker Marvell stock declined despite reporting strong AI demand and projecting accelerating revenue growth for the rest of the fiscal year. The market reaction suggests investors expected even stronger near-term results.
content: The custom-chip maker says revenue growth is expected “to continue accelerating each quarter” for the rest of the fiscal year.

zh.title: 尽管'异常'AI需求推动增长前景向好，Marvell股票反而下跌
zh.summary: 定制芯片制造商Marvell股票下跌，尽管报告了强劲的AI需求并预测本财年余期收入增速加快。市场反应表明投资者预期更强的短期业绩。

title: Salesforce shares dip on soft revenue outlook as AI disruption concerns linger
summary: Salesforce shares declined despite its Agentforce AI offering gaining traction, as the company's forward revenue guidance disappointed investors. AI adoption concerns persist despite software vendors' efforts to showcase AI solutions.
content: While the company’s Agentforce offering is picking up steam, Salesforce didn’t deliver the top-line growth investors wanted to see

zh.title: Salesforce股票因收入指引疲软而下跌，AI颠覆担忧挥之不去
zh.summary: Salesforce股票下跌，尽管其Agentforce AI产品获得关注，但该公司的前瞻收入指导令投资者失望。尽管软件供应商努力展示AI解决方案，但对AI采用的担忧仍然存在。

title: Mark Zuckerberg says a Meta cloud computing business 'definitely on the table'
summary: Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg indicated the company could enter cloud computing if it overbuilds data center capacity. This signals Meta's potential pivot from internal AI infrastructure spending to offering cloud services.
content: Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg said his company could enter the cloud computing market if it overspends on data centers and has excess capacity.

zh.title: 马克·扎克伯格表示Meta云计算业务"确实在考虑之中"
zh.summary: Meta首席执行官马克·扎克伯格表示，如果公司过度建设数据中心容量，该公司可能进入云计算领域。这表明Meta可能从内部人工智能基础设施支出转向提供云服务。

title: Asia-Pacific markets open lower as Iran-U.S. negotiations remain in focus
summary: Asia-Pacific equities opened lower as investors monitor ongoing Iran-U.S. negotiations, reflecting geopolitical uncertainty affecting regional markets. Regional sentiment remains cautious amid broader Middle East tensions.
content: Asia-Pacific markets opened lower on Thursday as investors parse the ongoing Iran-U.S. negotiations

zh.title: 亚太市场低开，伊朗-美国谈判仍受关注
zh.summary: 随着投资者关注正在进行的伊朗-美国谈判，亚太股市低开，反映了影响地区市场的地缘政治不确定性。在中东局势紧张的背景下，地区情绪仍然谨慎。

title: Inside India newsletter: Iran war disruptions, Modi's appeal to boost India's hospitality sector
summary: Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi's push for citizens to avoid foreign travel is benefiting the domestic travel and hospitality industry. Geopolitical tensions are reshaping travel patterns to favor local tourism.
content: Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi's appeal to curb foreign travel is proving to be a boon to the local travel industry.

zh.title: 《印度内幕》通讯：伊朗战争中断，莫迪呼吁提振印度酒店业
zh.summary: 印度总理纳伦德拉·莫迪推动公民避免出国旅行，这使国内旅游和酒店业受益。地缘政治紧张局势正在重塑旅游模式，以支持本地旅游。
